title: chore(deps): update dependency rollup to v1.9.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| rollup | devDependencies | minor | [`1.7.4` -> `1.9.0`](https://diff.intrinsic.com/rollup/1.7.4/1.9.0) | [source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rollup/rollup</summary>

### [`v1.9.0`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​190)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.8.0...v1.9.0)

_2019-04-05_

##### Features

-   Add built-in support for bigint ([#​2789](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2789))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2789](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2789): Ship with bigint support built-in ([@​danielgindi](https://togithub.com/danielgindi))
-   [#​2791](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2791): Use shared extractAssignedNames from rollup-pluginutils ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2792](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2792): Test that rollup-plugin-commonjs works with preserveModules ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.8.0`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​180)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.7.4...v1.8.0)

_2019-04-02_

##### Features

-   Support `module` as alias for `esm` and `commonjs` for `cjs` to match Node ([#​2783](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2783))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2782](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2782): Inline interopDefault in config loading ([@​guybedford](https://togithub.com/guybedford))
-   [#​2783](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2783): Support Node-style format aliases ([@​guybedford](https://togithub.com/guybedford))

</details>
